creator.title: Create Your AI Art
creator.description: Shape your idea into an AI Art prompt, and generate images for this theme. After generating images, you can choose one to submit under this theme and show everyone your imagination.
creator.promptPlaceholder: Describe anything you want to create...
creator.negativePromptPlaceholder: Optional: things to avoid, e.g. blurry hands, text, watermark
creator.failedNoCharge: Credits are not consumed for failed output.
creator.initialPrompt: A minimal poster-style image of transparent eyeglass lenses sharpening a blurred city map into readable streets and names, restrained design, crisp contrast, new perspective.
